payload.answer: Brain DB is the source of truth; Cognee is a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack is a strict memory intake agent. Telegram addition and cheapest high-performing model remain open questions.
payload.decision: Brain DB should be the source of truth; Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection; Slack should be a strict memory intake agent. Two open questions remain unresolved: whether Telegram should be added later, and which model is cheapest while saturating performance.

entity_resolution.reason: No prior entity identifiers were provided, and no disambiguation is required from the summary alone.

payload.intent: Extract durable memory from a chat summary about Brain architecture, preserving open questions as unresolved.

memory_cards.statement: Brain DB should be the source of truth for memory.
Cognee should be a rebuildable semantic projection rather than the primary source of truth.
Slack should function as a strict memory intake agent.
Whether Telegram should be added later is unresolved.
The cheapest model that still saturates performance has not been determined.

details: Preserved two items as open questions.
No superseded or deleted facts were introduced.

repair_options: If needed, store the three architecture statements as durable preferences/architecture facts.
Keep Telegram and model-choice items as unresolved questions until decided.
